title: Custom Pinball
description:
Neon-Drenched Roguelite PinballLaunch the ball, collect bumpers, and evolve your board.

This score-attack game seamlessly blends the exhilarating thrill of pinball with roguelite build-crafting. With every stage you clear, you'll acquire new bumpers and powerful upgrades to forge a board uniquely your own.

Collect Bumpers and Build Synergies Bumpers come in a wide variety of rarities and effects:

• Score-Burst Bumpers that rack up massive points.

• Coin-Generating Bumpers to fund your run.

• Combo-Boosting Bumpers to multiply your momentum.

• Legendary Bumpers that pack unique, game-changing effects. Depending on your placement and combinations, you'll trigger unexpected synergies, causing your score to skyrocket exponentially.

Glitch: High Risk, High Reward During your run, "Glitches" will appear. They act as major obstacles on the board, but breaking them grants powerful boons. However, if you fail to destroy them, you will face harsh penalties, such as:

• Increased stage score quotas

• Reduced coin earnings

• Spiking reroll costs Will you embrace the danger to reach greater heights, or play it safe? The choice is entirely yours.

A Unique Run Every Time• Randomized reward selections

• Ever-changing shops

• A massive roster of bumpers

• Build-defining rarity tiers

• Hidden special synergies No two runs are ever the same. Discover a fresh strategy with every single attempt.

Key Features• Roguelite × Pinball: A perfect fusion of genres.

• Deckbuilding on the Board: Collect bumpers and customize your layout.

• Deep Progression: Tons of unique upgrades to unlock.

• Risk & Reward: The disruptive yet rewarding Glitch system.

• Synergy-Driven Strategy: Craft your ultimate high-scoring build.

• Cyber Aesthetic: A vibrant, neon-glowing digital world.
description_short: A roguelite pinball game where your bumper setup seals your fate. Rely on luck, skill, and strategy to aim for the endless horizon!
